remaining_params.SpellDescription: You draw a card and you lose 1 life.
Create two 2/1 black Spider creature tokens with menace and reach.

params.Name: Emblem — Lolth, Spider Queen
params.SpellDescription: You get an emblem with "Whenever an opponent is dealt combat damage by one or more creatures you control, if that player lost less than 8 life this turn, they lose life equal to the difference."

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever a creature you control dies, put a loyalty counter on CARDNAME.
